title: Listening - Part 3
description: For each question, write the correct answer in the gap. Write one or two words or a number or a date or a time.
instructions: You will hear one person giving information. For questions 14–19, write the correct answer in the gap.
context: You will hear a teacher giving information about a healthy cooking course.
audio_script: Speaker: Thanks for joining our healthy cooking course. Over the next four weeks, you will learn how to make simple meals that taste good and do not take too long. The course is mainly for beginners, so we will not use difficult recipes or expensive kitchen machines. Your teacher is Anna Lewis, who worked in a hotel kitchen for ten years. Today Anna will show you how to make soup and salad, but next week the main topic will be [14]family meals[/14]. Many people asked for ideas they could cook after work, so that lesson should be useful. Classes are usually on Monday evenings, but the third class is different because the hall is being repaired. That week, we will meet on [15]Tuesday[/15] instead. Please arrive at six o'clock, as the doors will close at ten past. You do not need to bring knives or pans, but everyone must bring a [16]plastic box[/16] for any food they want to take home. The school provides an apron, although you can use your own if you prefer. During the last class, there will be a short talk by a nurse about [17]sugar[/17] in drinks. She will explain how to read labels in the supermarket. At the end of each lesson, you will taste the food together and talk about what was easy or difficult. We also give you a simple recipe card, so you can make the same meal again at home. The course costs [18]thirty-five[/18] pounds, and that includes all the food. If you miss a class, please call the office before [19]four o'clock[/19], so we know how much food to buy.

questions.explanation: The speaker says next week's main topic will be family meals.
The speaker says the third class will meet on Tuesday instead of Monday.
Students must bring a plastic box for food they want to take home.
The nurse will talk about sugar in drinks.
The speaker says the course costs thirty-five pounds.
The speaker asks students to call the office before four o'clock if they miss a class.
